query:
INSERT INTO agents (
            id,
            name,
            hostname,
            platform,
            agent_version
        )
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
            name = excluded.name,
            hostname = excluded.hostname,
            platform = excluded.platform,
            agent_version = excluded.agent_version,
            last_seen_at = unixepoch()
        RETURNING
            id,
            name,
            hostname,
            platform,
            agent_version,
            last_seen_at,
            created_at
